Ground Truth:
x^3 + y^2 - z = 3

Component functions:
  g1(x) = x^3
  g2(y) = y^2
  g3(z) = -z


Fitted Equation:
(-0.5176241*(0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)**3) + 0.44794345 - 0.44444817*(0.862725778817937*y + 0.0233873551934365)**2 + 0.329497443902514*z + 0.526592552869155 = 0.0000
R²_ortho = 0.9983

Component functions:
  g1(x) = -0.5176241*(0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)**3
  g2(y) = 0.44794345 - 0.44444817*(0.862725778817937*y + 0.0233873551934365)**2
  g3(z) = 0.329497443902514*z + 0.526592552869155
